rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL BRIMER VS. WHOLE FOODS MARKET, CALIFORNIA, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, MARCH 13, 2007, LINE 8. CROSS-DEFENDANT RUSSELL BRIMER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED. CROSS-COMPLAINT DOES NOT ALLEGE THAT PLAINTIFF HAS SOUGHT ANY PARTICULAR AMOUNT OF FEES AS TO WHICH THERE COULD BE AN EXISTING CONTROVERSY. THE ISSUES RAISED IN THE CROSS-COMPLAINT CONCERNING THE AMOUNT OF FEES CAN ALL BE ADDRESSED IN ANY MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF FEES THAT IS ULTIMATELY MADE. =(302/PJB/AP)
